item.title: 印度央行创造干预空间，卢比面临新一轮压力
item.description: 印度储备银行已为捍卫卢比汇率创造了更多灵活性，因不断升级的地缘政治紧张局势和关税不确定性正再度对该国货币构成压力。【原文：The Reserve Bank of India has carved out more flexibility to defend the rupee, as rising geopolitical tensions and tariff uncertainty begin to weigh on the currency again.】

item.title: Indonesia Says Board of Peace Talks Paused as Iran Crisis Rises
item.description: Indonesia’s foreign minister said talks on President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace initiative have been put on hold as diplomatic attention shifts to the escalating Middle East conflict involving Iran, Israel and the US.

item.title: Iran War Spurs Emerging Markets Rout, Threatens Investment Case
item.description: The war in Iran has swiftly turned emerging markets into one of the worst places to be for global investors.

item.title: Chinese Bank Halts Abu Dhabi Loan as Creditors Cut Mideast Risk
item.description: Several Chinese financial firms are scaling back exposure to Middle Eastern debt, while regulators are stepping up oversight as the conflict raises concerns over the nation’s extensive lending in the region.

item.title: Saudi Chemical Giant Sabic Names Al-Faqeer New CEO
item.description: Saudi Arabia’s biggest chemical producer Sabic named Faisal Mohammed Al-Faqeer as chief executive officer after Abdulrahman Al-Fageeh announced his resignation, according to a company statement.

item.title: FTSE 100 Set to Rebound After Selloff, Pound Falls
Bayer Forecasts Flat 2026 Profits Amid Roundup Settlement Effort
item.description: Bayer AG forecast profits and sales to be little changed in 2026 as the German agriculture and pharmaceuticals company grapples with generic competition for its blockbuster blood thinner and continued uncertainty over its efforts to contain a pesticide litigation in the US.

item.title: 反贪污委员会调查马来西亚与软银旗下ARM公司的交易，法新社报道
item.description: 据法新社报道，马来西亚反贪污委员会正在调查政府与Arm Holdings Plc公司达成的一项交易中涉嫌的滥用职权、欺诈及治理问题。【原文：Malaysia’s anti-graft agency is investigating alleged abuse of power, fraud and governance issues linked to a deal between the government and Arm Holdings Plc, AFP reported.】

item.title: Adidas Forecasts Higher Profits and Promises Bigger Payouts
item.description: Adidas AG forecast higher profits this year and market share gains through 2028 as the German brand looks to maintain its momentum with retro sneakers and new running and football products.

item.title: Ueda Says Iran Conflict Could Hit Japan’s Economy Significantly
item.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda warned that the Middle East conflict could have a major impact on the nation’s economy, in comments likely to firm up investor expectations that authorities will hold policy steady when they meet later this month.

item.title: Real Estate Executives Say Deals at Risk From Middle East Crisis
item.description: The conflict in the Middle East sent a chill through one of Singapore’s marquee real estate conferences even before the event started.

item.title: Luckin Coffee Backer Centurium Is Said to Be in Advanced Talks for Blue Bottle
item.description: Centurium Capital Partners is in advanced talks to acquire Nestle SA’s Blue Bottle Coffee, according to people familiar with the situation.

item.title: 阿联酋股市在伊朗冲突导致休市后重启交易时下跌
item.description: 阿联酋股市在周三恢复交易后大幅下挫，此前该国为保护关键市场免受美以对伊朗袭击的影响，已连续停市两天。【原文：Equities in the United Arab Emirates tumbled as trading resumed on Wednesday, following a two-day closure aimed at protecting the Gulf state’s key markets amid the US-Israeli attacks on Iran.】

item.title: 泰国股指暴跌8%触发交易暂停
item.description: 泰国基准股指暴跌8%，触发市场交易暂停，因中东局势紧张加剧令市场情绪受挫。【原文：Thailand’s benchmark stock gauge plunged 8%, triggering a suspension in market trading, as escalating tensions in the Middle East dampened sentiment.】

item.title: 航运业者称特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡的承诺仅是部分解决方案
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国将通过保险担保甚至海军护航来确保波斯湾能源运输的自由流通。但航运业认为——即便在最乐观的情况下——这也只是解决这场历史性危机的部分方案。【原文：President Donald Trump says the US will ensure the free flow of energy through the Persian Gulf with insurance guarantees and even naval escorts. But the shipping industry sees it — at best — as only a partial solution to a historic crisis.】

item.title: 波兰降息前景存疑，伊朗风险蔓延
item.description: 随着围绕伊朗的冲突持续升级，通胀压力可能卷土重来，金融市场亦受冲击，波兰原定于周三再度降息的预期正面临日益增大的不确定性。【原文：Poland’s expected return to interest-rate cuts on Wednesday is increasingly in doubt as the conflict raging around Iran risks reviving inflationary pressures and rattles financial markets.】

item.title: 丹麦经济将超越北欧其他国家 尽管诺和诺德陷入困境 丹麦银行称
item.description: 丹麦最大贷款机构表示，尽管制药巨头诺和诺德公司正面临销售放缓的困境，但今年丹麦经济仍有望以北欧地区最快的速度增长。【原文：Denmark’s economy is poised to expand at the fastest pace in the Nordic region this year, even as pharmaceutical giant Novo Nordisk A/S grapples with slowing sales, according to the country’s largest lender.】

item.title: 日本第二大贷款机构SMFC股价暴跌，因曝出对MFS的风险敞口
item.description: 三井住友金融集团股价创近一年最大跌幅，此前有报道称其银行子公司对Market Financial Solutions Ltd.存在大量风险敞口。这家英国公司的倒闭已波及多家金融机构。【原文：Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. shares tumbled the most in almost a year after its banking subsidiary was reported to have a big exposure to Market Financial Solutions Ltd., whose collapse in the UK has hit several financial firms.】

item.title: 伊朗乐观情绪或占上风，但并非不劳而获
item.description:
若抛售看似机遇，那也仅仅是因为风险真实存在。

【原文：

If the selloff looks like an opportunity, it’s only because the risks are very real.

】

item.title: 坎托尔看好阿联酋银行 尽管中东局势动荡
item.description: 尽管地区冲突威胁着海湾国家，坎托菲茨杰拉德公司仍建议买入阿联酋银行股，称这些股票是"低风险、高回报"的投资。【原文：Cantor Fitzgerald recommended buying shares of United Arab Emirates banks despite regional conflict threatening the Gulf state, calling the stocks “low-risk, high-return” investments.】

item.title: 全球基金清仓最热门的人工智能交易，因原油供应担忧加剧
item.description: 今年，外国投资者正纷纷撤离亚洲最热门的市场，人工智能行业的狂热逐渐让位于对石油驱动的通胀冲击的担忧。【原文：Foreigners are fleeing from Asia’s hottest markets this year, as exuberance in the artificial-intelligence trade gives way to fears about an oil-driven inflation shock.】

item.title: 日本电力价格延续涨势，中东动荡持续
item.description: 本周日本电价飙升，因中东冲突加剧了市场对能源供应长期中断的担忧。【原文：Japan power prices surged this week as the conflict in the Middle East raised concerns about prolonged disruptions to energy supply.】

item.title: 印度卢比跌至历史新低，油价飙升加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 印度卢比汇率跌至历史最低点，债券价格下跌，市场担忧中东冲突升级导致原油价格上涨，可能推高通胀并扩大该国贸易逆差。【原文：India’s rupee weakened to a record low and bonds fell on concern that rising crude prices, amid the escalating conflict in the Middle East, could stoke inflation and widen the nation’s trade deficit.】

item.title: 雷森公司股东放弃救援陷入困境的燃料生产商的谈判
item.description: 据知情人士透露，由于共同所有者科桑公司和壳牌公司未能就融资计划达成一致，拯救雷森公司的谈判宣告破裂。这使得这家巴西糖业和乙醇生产商摆脱债务危机的途径日益有限。【原文：Talks to rescue Raízen SA fell apart after co-owners Cosan SA and Shell Plc failed to agree to a plan to raise capital, according to people familiar with the matter, leaving the Brazilian sugar and ethanol producer with dwindling options to emerge from a debt crisis.】

item.title: 伊朗战争对利率、通胀和股市意味着什么
item.description:
本周播客内容：战争将如何影响澳大利亚经济

【原文：

On this week’s podcast: How the war will impact the Australian economy

】

item.title: 亚洲市场暴跌加剧，中东战争令投资者惶惶不安
item.description: 2026年3月3日，伊朗德黑兰，一名身份不明的男子在美国与以色列联合袭击中遭破坏的警察局废墟中工作。（图片来源：Morteza Nikoubazl/NurPhoto via Getty Images）【原文：An unidentified man works among the ruins of a police station that is struck during U.S.-Israeli attacks in Tehran, Iran, on March 3, 2026. (Photo by Morteza Nikoubazl/NurPhoto via Getty Images)】

item.title: 外国投资者四个月来首次大举买入印尼股票
item.description: 海外投资者买入印尼股票的规模创下四个月多来新高，监管机构推出新举措以提升该国市场的投资吸引力，提振了市场情绪。【原文：Overseas investors bought the most Indonesian equities in more than four months, as fresh initiatives by regulators to enhance the nation’s market investability bolstered sentiment.】

item.title: 韩国央行行长李明博推迟出访行程，就韩元汇率问题发出警告，中东局势担忧加剧
item.description: 韩国央行行长李昌镐警告称，外汇市场不应出现过度波动。此前受中东局势引发的金融市场动荡影响，韩元汇率隔夜跌至全球金融危机以来的最低点。【原文：Bank of Korea Governor Rhee Chang Yong warned against excessive movements in the currency market after it sank to its weakest level since the global financial crisis overnight amid Middle East-triggered financial-market volatility.】

item.title: 中国人民币汇率骤然逆转，暴露对战争与油价冲击的忧虑
item.description: 伊朗战争正迫使中国决策者对人民币政策做出急转弯。【原文：The Iranian war is forcing Chinese policymakers into abrupt shifts on the yuan.】

item.title: 沙巴洪水过后 马来西亚棕榈油产量将大幅下滑
item.description: 马来西亚主要棕榈油种植州遭遇洪灾后，该国棕榈油产量预计将出现逾一年来最大月度降幅，库存因此减少，这可能支撑油价走高。【原文：Malaysia’s palm oil production is set for the steepest monthly decline in more than a year after floods across its major growing state, trimming inventories and likely underpinning higher prices.】
